name: confirm-dialog
description: Confirmation dialog block with title, message, and action buttons.

props.name: visible
props.description: Controls whether the dialog is visible.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called when the dialog is dismissed (backdrop tap or cancel).

props.name: title
props.description: Heading text displayed prominently at the top of the dialog.

props.name: message
props.description: Explanatory body text shown below the title.

props.name: onConfirm
props.description: Called when the confirm button is pressed.

props.name: confirmLabel
props.description: Label for the confirm action button.

props.name: cancelLabel
props.description: Label for the cancel action button.

props.name: onCancel
props.description: Called when the cancel button is pressed. Falls back to onClose if not provided.

props.name: destructive
props.description: Activates destructive visual mode: red warning banner, error-coloured title, and a destructive confirm button style.

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a loading indicator on the confirm button, useful while an async action is in-flight.
